questions.question: What country sells the world Guinness beer?
What TV host noted, "You can call me he, you can can call me she, as long as you call me"?
Who spent an hour and 48 minutes where no man had gone before on April 12, 1961?
What was the first car with headlights that automatically dimmed when another car approached?
What 1995 World Series teams were both picketed by the American Indian Movement?
questions.answer: The Atlanta Braves and Cleveland Indians
